Title: Relates to reporting of certain independent expenditures
Summary: Relates to reporting of certain independent expenditures and penalties for failing to report such expenditures; includes certain communications which use language or imagery substantially associated with a candidate's campaign, platform, background, or publicly stated positions, such that a reasonable viewer would understand the communication as designed to influence the outcome of such general, special, or primary election in the definition of independent expenditure.
LawCode: Amd §§14-107 & 14-126, El L; amd §1052, NYC Chart
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the election law and the New York city charter, in relation to independent expenditures
